Image widget. Loads PNG / JPEG / BMP / GIF from disk via Pixie, caches decoded images by absolute path, and paints them through the canvas.

Public surface:

  • image(path) widget constructor.
  • imageMemory(bytes) for in-memory image data.
  • clearImageCache() to drop the cache (useful in tests).

The decoded Image is held by the cache; the widget just carries the path or bytes. Painting goes through a custom drawImageAt proc on the canvas; backends that don't implement image drawing show a placeholder rectangle.

Imports

../foundation/widget, ../foundation/render_object, ../foundation/geometry, ../foundation/color, ../foundation/key

Types

ImageFit = enum
  ifFill, ifContain, ifCover, ifNone
How to scale the image into its slot:
  • ifFill: stretch to fill, ignore aspect ratio
  • ifContain: largest size that fits, preserve aspect ratio
  • ifCover: smallest size that covers, preserve aspect ratio
  • ifNone: draw at native size, top-left aligned
ImageWidget = ref object of RenderObjectWidget
  path*: string              ## absolute disk path; empty for in-memory
  bytes*: string             ## raw image bytes; empty when using path
  fit*: ImageFit
  width*: float32
  height*: float32
Carries the image source plus rendering hints. 
RenderImage = ref object of RenderObject
  path*: string
  bytes*: string
  fit*: ImageFit
  requestedW*: float32
  requestedH*: float32
  when not defined(js):
    decoded*: pixie.Image

Procs

proc clearImageCache() {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Drops every decoded image from the cache. Use in tests or to free memory when transitioning between scenes. 
proc image(path: string; fit: ImageFit = ifContain; width: float32 = 0.0;
           height: float32 = 0.0; key: Key = nil): ImageWidget {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}

Builds an Image widget that loads path from disk.

Inputs:

  • path: absolute path to PNG / JPEG / BMP / GIF.
  • fit: how to scale the image into the widget's box.
  • width, height: optional explicit dims. Zero leaves the axis derived from constraints + native aspect ratio.
  • key: optional reconciliation key.

Effect: decodes the image once (cached for subsequent uses of the same path), then paints via the canvas's drawImage on every frame. Shows a light grey placeholder if the load fails.

proc imageMemory(bytes: string; fit: ImageFit = ifContain; width: float32 = 0.0;
                 height: float32 = 0.0; key: Key = nil): ImageWidget {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Builds an Image widget from in-memory bytes. Same semantics as image otherwise. Useful for embedded images via staticRead or images received over the network. 
proc loadImage(path, bytes: string): auto {....raises: [KeyError],
    tags: [RootEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Returns the decoded Pixie image for the given source, decoding and caching on first call. Returns nil on failure (file missing, decode error, etc.).

Methods

    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [RootEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect],
    forbids: [].}
method hitTest(r: RenderImage; htResult: HitTestResult; position: Offset): bool {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
method paint(r: RenderImage; ctx: PaintingContext; offset: Offset) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
method performLayout(r: RenderImage) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Sizing strategy:
  • Both width and height requested: use them tight (subject to parent's constraints).
  • One dimension requested + image known: derive the other from the aspect ratio.
  • Neither requested + image known: use image's natural size, clamped to parent's constraints.
  • No image: fill bounded constraints, or 0x0.
method updateRenderObject(w: ImageWidget; ctx: BuildContext; r: RenderObject) {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [RootEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect],
    forbids: [].}
method widgetTypeName(w: ImageWidget): string {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
